name: BTC Funding Rates
description: Periodic payments between long/short traders in perpetual swaps. Positive = longs paying shorts (overheated). Negative = shorts paying longs (capitulation). Real-time sentiment.
trading_signal: >0.05% → Market overheated (Longs will be liquidated). <-0.05% → Market capitulated (Shorts will be liquidated, reversal coming).
